vulnerability.reference: Overfitted offline models fail to generalize to real-world opponent deviations, causing mid-air collisions.
vulnerability.generated: Operator sole reliance on TIPR's instant refinement without real-time adversary monitoring enables overfitting to suboptimal offline data.

impact.reference: Physical crashes damaging equipment and potentially injuring bystanders, raising liability and insurance costs.
impact.generated: Frequent drone crashes and race losses when myopic policies encounter deviating opponent actions.

dose_response.reference: Plug-and-play refinement with truncated Q overfits to offline data, causing collisions when drone opponents deviate, which leads to physical crashes and public distrust.
dose_response.generated: Myopic strategies from truncated Q-value estimation using suboptimal offline data, through drone operators' TIPR-based adversary prediction, trigger sole reliance on instant refinement without real-time monitoring, causing overfitting and leading to frequent drone crashes and race losses when opponents deviate.
